project.name: gpu-failure-detector
project.summary: Fail-slow / silent-failure detection for large-scale GPU training clusters (DCGM + NCCL telemetry → K8s auto-remediation). Building v0→v3 over the coming weeks. This week = v0 kickoff.

tasks.text: Pull GWDG DCGM dataset (Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.19052367) + skim "When GPUs Fail Quietly"
Set up repo + EDA the telemetry (DCGM metrics + Slurm node-state transitions)
Reproduce the fail-quiet signals (thermal drift; scrape-latency / sample-loss / metric-disappearance)
Prototype v0 detector — μ+kσ fail-slow flag over a sliding window
README — problem statement, data sources, v0→v3 roadmap

work.name: SRX anomaly detection
work.summary: Day-job staff project. Data engineering + moving the anomaly/RCA engine from static rules toward ML.

tasks.text: Data engineering — organize OTel / Prometheus telemetry pipeline
Improve the current static / rule-based anomaly + RCA engine
Explore ML-based RCA — scope the approach
Read DMLS (Chip Huyen) — apply a chapter to the pipeline
